title: Gooey Romantic Earthy Norwegian Beetroot Stir-fry
description: This earthy and gooey dish combines sweet pomegranate molasses with aromatic beetroots for a romantic and keto-friendly meal.
instructions: Clean and chop the beets into bite-sized pieces.
Mix pomegranate molasses, lemon juice, salt, and olive oil in a bowl until well combined.
Toss beet chunks with the marinade mixture for about 2 minutes to ensure all beets are coated evenly.
Spread the marinated beets on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake in preheated oven for approximately 30-45 minutes, flipping over halfway through cooking time until tender and slightly caramelized.
Serve hot as a side dish or appetizer.
